name: vibe-talk
description: Vibe Talk — Real-time MERN chat app

scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('server/.env')){fs.copyFileSync('server/.env.example','server/.env');console.log('✅ Created server/.env — open it and fill in MONGO_URI, JWT_SECRET, and Cloudinary values');} if(!fs.existsSync('client/.env')){fs.copyFileSync('client/.env.example','client/.env');console.log('✅ Created client/.env — defaults already point to localhost:5000');}"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm run setup
